item.text: {"id":"urn:molaug-v0:status","verdict":"REPAIR","gloss_scholarly":true,"explication_carries_gloss":false,"self_flag_correct":false,"sense_collision_free":true,"reason":"The MAYBE-scoped comparisons do not assert an accorded relative position, so the rendering can reduce to membership; explicitly encode members' shared nonliteral ranking of X relative to other members and revise the self-flag."}
